DECLARATION OF MIA O.SOLVESSON IN SUPPORT OF PLTF'S OPPOSITION TO DEFT'S SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE FILED BY PLAINTIFF SPARACO, JUDYANN

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT ARDEN UPP'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT IS GRANTED AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 3 AND 7 AND DENIED AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION, 6, & 11. DEFENDANT HAS SHOWN THAT ALL FIVE CAUSES OF ACTION ARE BASED ON PROTECTED ACTIVITY. PLAINTIFF HAS SHOWN A LIKELIHOOD OF SUCCESS AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 5,6, AND 11. BUT NOT 3 AND 7, AS TO WHICH THE ONLY WRONGFUL CONDUCT ALLEGED IS THE PRIVILEGED CONDUCT OF SEEKING PLAINTIFF'S EVICTION THROUGH NOTICES AND LITIGATION. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189 (301/PJB)

DISCOVERY 612, DEFENDANT ARDEN UPP'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF TO ATTEND DEPOSITION IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. PLAINTIFF'S DEPOSITION SHALL PROCEED FIRST AND SHALL BE FOLLOWED BY DEFENDANT'S DEPOSITION. COUNSEL SHALL MEET AND CONFER ON THE DATES FOR THE DEPOSITIONS WHICH SHALL BE SET FOR DATES NO LATER THAN DECEMBER 19, 2008. ALL REQUESTS FOR SANCTIONS ARE DENIED. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED

Notice Of Motion To Compel Pltf To Attend Deposition
Off Calendar Nov-24-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Peter Hadiaris, Esq., for defendant and moving party: Arden Upp
Naoki S. Kaneko, Esq., for Planitiff and opposing party: Judyann Sparaco

HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Defendant Arden Upp's Motion To Compel Plaintiff To Attend Deposition is granted in part and denied in part. Plaintiff's deposition shall proceed first and shall be followed by Defendant's deposition. Counsel shall meet and confer on the dates for the depositions which shall be set for dates no later than December 19, 2008. All requests for sanctions are denied. Order was signed in open court. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Deft Arden Van Upp'S Deposition
Off Calendar Nov-24-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Naoki S. Kaneko, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party:: Judyann Sparaco
Peter Hadiaris, Esq., for defendant and opposing party: Arden Upp

HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Plaintiff Judyann Sparaco's Motion To Compel Defendant Arden Van Upp's Deposition is granted in part and denied in part. Plaintiff's deposition shall proceed first and shall be followed by Defendant's deposition. Counsel shall meet and confer on the dates for the depositions which shall be set for dates no later than December 19, 2008. All requests for sanctions are denied. Order was signed in open court. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED

Notice Of Motion For Atty Fees
Off Calendar Oct-14-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
NO APPEARANCE WAS MADE BY THE DEFENDANT/MOVING PARTY, ARDEN VAN UPP
NAOKI S. KANEKO, ESQ.(SHOOK, HARDY & BACON, LLP), (415)544-1900, FOR PLAINTIFF/OPPOSING PARTY, JUDYANN SPARACO

MR. KANEKO DID NOT GIVE NOTICE TO THE MOVING PARTY OF HIS INTENT TO ARGUE THE MATTER. BASED ON MR. KANEKO'S REPRESENTATION, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT ARDEN VAN UPP'S Motion For Attorney Fees. DEFENDANT ACCOMPLISHED AT LEAST A SMALL ADVANCE IN IT'S LITIGATION POSTURE BY ELIMINATING THE TWO CLAIMS, BUT NOT MUCH. FEES AND COSTS AWARDED IN THE AMOUNT OF $790.00. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189 (301/PJB/AY)

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS : DEFENDANT ARDEN UPP'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT IS GRANTED AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 3 AND 7 AND DENIED AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION, 6, & 11. DEFENDANT HAS SHOWN THAT ALL FIVE CAUSES OF ACTION ARE BASED ON PROTECTED ACTIVITY. PLAINTIFF HAS SHOWN A LIKELIHOOD OF SUCCESS AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 5,6, AND 11. BUT NOT 3 AND 7, AS TO WHICH THE ONLY WRONGFUL CONDUCT ALLEGED IS THE PRIVILEGED CONDUCT OF SEEKING PLAINTIFF'S EVICTION THROUGH NOTICES AND LITIGATION. Prevailing party is to prepare a form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR# 8189 =301/PJB/PM
